---
title: "Kellen Cavagnero, Ph.D."
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

<img src="files/headshot.jpeg" style="width:25%">

About me
---------------
Hello world! I am a biomedical scientist, specialized in immunology. Here you will find links to my CV, the Inflammatory Content Podcast, recorded talks, article recommendations, and my Google Scholar, X, and LinkedIn profiles.
